name: story-handdrawn-studio
description: Customizable studio for turning Chinese stories or ordered images into hand-drawn Remotion videos.

scripts.render: npm run check:assets:text && remotion render src/index.ts PictureSilent out/picture_silent.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=18 --pixel-format=yuv420p --muted --concurrency=1
scripts.render:preview: npm run check:assets:text && remotion render src/index.ts PictureSilent out/picture_silent-preview.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=23 --pixel-format=yuv420p --muted --scale=0.6666666666666666 --concurrency=1
scripts.render:uploaded: npm run check:assets:uploaded && remotion render src/index.ts UploadedPictureSilent out/uploaded_picture_silent.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=18 --pixel-format=yuv420p --muted --concurrency=1
scripts.render:uploaded:preview: npm run check:assets:uploaded && remotion render src/index.ts UploadedPictureSilent out/uploaded_picture_silent-preview.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=23 --pixel-format=yuv420p --muted --scale=0.6666666666666666 --concurrency=1
scripts.check: npm run check:types && npm run check:storyboard
